shadow_mode_deltas.reason: Legacy prefix classification would label SKILL002 as managed_blocker, but the authoritative bundle assigns manual_prerequisite_blocker.

ticket_recommendations.title: Godot headless validation fails
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-004 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.

ticket_recommendations.title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
ticket_recommendations.summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

ticket_recommendations.title: The generated lease-ownership contract is split across coordinator and worker surfaces, so agents can disagree about who should claim a ticket and when bootstrap gates apply
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate WFLOW012 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Adopt one lease model everywhere: the team leader owns `ticket_claim` and `ticket_release`, specialists work only inside the already-active ticket lease, and only Wave 0 setup work may claim before bootstrap is ready.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Adopt one lease model everywhere: the team leader owns `ticket_claim` and `ticket_release`, specialists work only inside the already-active ticket lease, and only Wave 0 setup work may claim before bootstrap is ready.

ticket_recommendations.title: Fail-state routing is still under-specified in generated prompts or workflow skills
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate WFLOW024 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Document review, QA, smoke-test, and bootstrap failure recovery paths in ticket-execution, and instruct the team leader to follow transition_guidance.recovery_action whenever it is present.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Document review, QA, smoke-test, and bootstrap failure recovery paths in ticket-execution, and instruct the team leader to follow transition_guidance.recovery_action whenever it is present.

ticket_recommendations.title: The repo-local `ticket-execution` skill is too thin to explain the actual lifecycle contract to weaker models
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate SKILL002 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Keep `ticket-execution` narrowly procedural: route from `ticket_lookup.transition_guidance`, stop after repeated lifecycle contradictions, reserve `smoke_test` as the only PASS producer, and keep slash commands human-only.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Keep `ticket-execution` narrowly procedural: route from `ticket_lookup.transition_guidance`, stop after repeated lifecycle contradictions, reserve `smoke_test` as the only PASS producer, and keep slash commands human-only.
